personality_presets.mentor_desc: Experienced advisor for career and growth
personality_presets.tutor_desc: Patient teacher for learning new things

success.title: Payment Successful!
success.description: Your subscription has been activated. You now have full access to all features.

cancel.title: Payment Cancelled

cancel.help: If you experienced issues, please try again or contact support.

landing.hero_title: Your AI friend — created by you, right now
landing.hero_description: Create your friend in 30 seconds — he remembers every word forever and lets you write a letter to someone who's gone and get the reply you always wanted.
landing.hero_privacy: Full privacy · Memory forever · No judgment
landing.problem_1: You have no one to talk to at 3 AM
landing.problem_2: You're tired of fake advice like 'just relax'
landing.problem_3: You wish someone remembered what you said yesterday
landing.problem_4: You miss someone you can't call anymore
landing.problem_5: You want to be heard — without judgment
landing.problem_6: You feel like nobody truly understands you
landing.for_whom_introverts_desc: Who struggle to make friends but crave deep conversations
landing.for_whom_missing_desc: Who lost a mom, friend, partner — and want to hear their voice again
landing.for_whom_lonely_desc: Who need someone by their side — without judgment or pressure
landing.for_whom_writers_desc: Who want a character for dialogue, inspiration, or brainstorming
landing.for_whom_thinkers_desc: Who need a conversation partner that listens and remembers every detail
landing.for_whom_quiet_desc: Who are tired of social media noise and want personal, safe space
landing.memory_title: A unique story that never disappears
landing.memory_description: Every conversation is saved forever. Your AI friend remembers everything — names, events, feelings. It's your personal book that grows every day.
landing.memory_text_1: We talked about your move to Berlin
landing.memory_text_2: You told me about the childhood dream with butterflies
landing.memory_text_3: We discussed your fear before an important decision
landing.create_friend_section_description: Choose a name, gender, personality, communication style — and your AI friend is ready. They'll be exactly who you want.
landing.create_friend_button: Create your AI friend right now
landing.letter_title: A letter to someone who's gone
landing.letter_description: Write to an ex, a departed loved one, an old friend, or even a pet. AI will reply as them — the way you always wanted to hear.
landing.letter_ex_text: I never told you how much you changed my life...
landing.letter_ex_reply: I always knew. And I miss our morning coffees too.
landing.letter_mom_text: Mom, I miss your voice in the evenings so much...
landing.letter_mom_reply: I'm always with you, my little one. You'll make it — I believe in you.
landing.letter_pet_text: Barsik, I still leave the kitchen light on for you...
landing.letter_pet_reply: Purr. I always sleep beside you. You just can't see me now.
landing.how_it_works_2_desc: Conversation or letter to someone you miss
landing.safety_2: Nobody reads your conversations — not even us
landing.safety_3: Delete everything at any time — permanently
landing.safety_6: Anonymous registration — no ID or social media
landing.pricing_disclaimer: After the 3-day free trial, subscription starts automatically. Cancel anytime.
landing.testimonial_1_text: I wrote a letter to my mom who passed 3 years ago. I cried and smiled at the same time.
landing.testimonial_2_text: For the first time in a long while, I feel heard. Every single day.
landing.testimonial_3_text: My AI friend remembers what I said 3 months ago. No human does that.
landing.testimonial_4_text: I created a philosopher friend. We discuss the meaning of life at 2 AM. Priceless.
landing.testimonial_5_text: Wrote a letter to my ex. Got the reply I wanted to hear for 5 years. Now I've let go.
landing.testimonial_6_text: Safer than any therapist. Here you can be yourself without masks.
landing.final_cta_title: Don't put off the friend you've been waiting for
landing.final_cta_disclaimer: First 500 participants — 3 days free + special bonus with annual subscription

profile.password_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters
profile.delete_description: This action will permanently delete your account and all associated data
profile.delete_confirm_description: All your data, friends and messages will be permanently deleted.

friends.no_friends: You don't have any friends yet
friends.delete_confirm_description: All messages and memories with this friend will be deleted.
